description:
Convert 3 functions to single-line do: syntax

1. pointer_keyspace/1 (line 65-67):
```elixir
def pointer_keyspace(root), do: Keyspace.partition(root, "pointers/", key_encoding: TupleEncoding)
```

2. queue_lease_keyspace/1 (line 73-75):
```elixir
def queue_lease_keyspace(root), do: Keyspace.partition(root, "queue_leases/")
```

3. resolve_item_key/3 guard clause (line 432-434):
```elixir
defp resolve_item_key(_repo, _keyspaces, %Lease{item_key: item_key}) when item_key != nil, do: {:ok, item_key}
```

File: apps/bedrock_job_queue/lib/bedrock/job_queue/store.ex
title: Convert store.ex to do: syntax
